testcase.name: test_update_rdp_to_ricevuta
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_commessa_ops.py:141: in test_update_rdp_to_ricevuta assert updated_rdp is not None E assert None is not None

testcase.name: test_update_ordine_to_confermato

testcase.name: test_get_produzione
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_commessa_ops.py:335: in test_get_produzione assert len(data['fasi']) == 6 E assert 0 == 6 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_update_fase_in_corso
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_commessa_ops.py:348: in test_update_fase_in_corso taglio = next(f for f in fasi if f['tipo'] == 'taglio') ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E StopIteration

testcase.name: test_production_progress_calculation

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 0 == 6 + where 0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf93f3d734e00>('total') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf93f3d734e00> = {'completed': 0, 'percentage': 0, 'total': 0}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_commessa_ops.py:380: in test_production_progress_calculation assert progress.get('total') == 6 E AssertionError: assert 0 == 6 E + where 0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf93f3d734e00>('total') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf93f3d734e00> = {'completed': 0, 'percentage': 0, 'total': 0}.get
